mnemonics: Close to Start (Closure Properties) - 'Cows Eat Grass' : C - Close, E - Eat, S - Start
Regular Language Closure Properties - 'Rainbow' : R - Regular, L - Language, C - Closure, P - Properties
keyPoints: Closure Properties of Regular Languages: A set of strings is closed under a operation if the result of the operation on any string in the set is also in the set.
Union Closure Property: If A and B are regular languages, then A ∪ B is regular
Intersection Closure Property: If A and B are regular languages, then A ∩ B is regular
Complement Closure Property: If A is a regular language, then A' is regular
Equivalence of Regular Languages: Two regular languages are equivalent if and only if their intersection is regular
Minimization of Automata: A minimal automaton is one with the fewest number of states necessary to recognize a language
Minimizing Equivalence Classes of States: To minimize an automaton, find and merge equivalent states
Regular Expressions: A way to describe regular languages using patterns and operators
